extensions.name: aimlapi_music
extensions.description: AI music generation via AimlAPI — generates songs from lyrics and style prompts using minimax/music models

operations.name: generate_music
operations.description: Generate a music/song from lyrics and a style prompt. Provide prompt (style description, mood, genre) and lyrics. Optionally set is_instrumental=true for instrumental-only music, or lyrics_optimizer=true to auto-generate lyrics from the prompt.

body.prompt: Lo-fi pop hip-hop ambient music, slow intro: 10 s, then faster and with loud bass: 10 s
body.lyrics:
[Verse]
Streetlights flicker, the night breeze sighs
Shadows stretch as I walk alone

operations.returns: Returns { id, status, audio_file: { url }, meta: { usage: { credits_used, usd_spent } } }. Status is 'queued', then 'generating', then 'completed'. The audio_file.url is the download link.

extensions.notes: Async: runtime polls every 3s; status goes queued → generating → completed. Final result has audio_file.url with the downloadable MP3. After getting the URL, you MUST download the audio file locally using the aimlapi_cdn extension — extract the path from the URL (everything after https://cdn.aimlapi.com) and call aimlapi_cdn/download_audio with { path: "..." }. This saves the file to your workspace so you can embed it directly for the user. Never just give the user the URL.

extensions.name: aimlapi_cdn
extensions.description: Download generated audio files from AimlAPI CDN — saves them locally as binary files

operations.name: download_audio
operations.description: Download an audio file from the CDN. Pass the full URL path (everything after https://cdn.aimlapi.com) including any query parameters.
operations.returns: Audio file saved locally. Returns { file_path, mime, size } where file_path is the path to the saved file in data/extensions/aimlapi_cdn/
